buy-hold-benchmark.definition: equal-weight long-only buy-and-hold of the same universe, unit gross, same rebalance grid (reference, not a strategy)

canonical-core.cost_policy: 6.0 bps per leg, applied on turnover
canonical-core.signal_definition: sign of the 28d (672h) trailing log-price change per symbol; long if positive, short if negative
canonical-core.universe_policy: deployment universe = original 20 liquid Binance USDM perps; generalization validated across thematic/liquidity universes with FIXED params (zero re-tune)

managed_vol_overlay.note: Moreira-Muir managed-vol overlay (window=12 rebalances, cap=3.0) is NOT in the canonical core; it belongs to combined-caveated.

canonical-core.weighting: per-leg inverse realized-volatility (7d), signed by the 28d trend, normalized to unit gross exposure across the long/short book

cash-benchmark.definition: flat / zero-return cash (0% nominal, no funding)

combined-caveated.cost_policy: 6.0 bps per leg, applied on turnover
combined-caveated.note: SECONDARY monitoring variant (TSM-008). Only partly generalizes (beats base in 3/7 universes); NOT the universal core.
combined-caveated.signal_definition: sign of the 28d (672h) trailing log-price change per symbol; long if positive, short if negative
combined-caveated.universe_policy: deployment universe = original 20 liquid Binance USDM perps; generalization validated across thematic/liquidity universes with FIXED params (zero re-tune)

managed_vol_overlay.target_definition: expanding causal mean of trailing realized vol; scale = clip(target/sigma, 0, cap); both sigma and target use shift(1)

combined-caveated.weighting: per-leg inverse realized-volatility (7d), signed by the 28d trend, normalized to unit gross exposure across the long/short book
